_comment: DEV/INTEGRATOR-console hooks, attached at launch via `claude --settings` (merges additively with user/project settings). This is console-hooks.settings.json PLUS the dev rails, so a LOCAL dev mission on ANY repo gets the same hard guard a Miss-Claude worktree gets from its checked-in .claude/settings.json (and a remote one gets from the shipped miss-rails.settings.json). Wired by console-session-wt.sh -> claude-miss and scripts/claude-miss-integrator, which export: the $MISSION_DOC_* doc-nudge paths (see console-hooks.settings.json for how that three-part mechanism works), $MISSWORK_HOOK (abs path to .claude/hooks/prevent-misswork.py — the HARD role guard), and $MISS_ROLE_CONTEXT (scripts/miss-role-context.py — SessionStart prints the role rules + YES phrases into context for repos whose CLAUDE.md doesn't carry them; it self-quiets in the mission-dashboard repo). The PreToolUse command is deliberately UNguarded: if $MISSWORK_HOOK is unset/missing, python3 exits 2 and the tool call is BLOCKED — fail-closed, never silently unguarded. In a Miss-Claude worktree the guard also runs via the repo's .claude/settings.json (twice total) — harmless, the hook is read-only.
